title: Collect native seed
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect native seed demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to collect seed

pcs.text: Identify and follow environmental, legislative and organisational requirements for collecting seed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow environmental, legislative and organisational requirements for collecting seed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow environmental, legislative and organisational requirements for collecting seed.

pcs.text: Review work plan for seed collection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review work plan for seed collection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review work plan for seed collection.

pcs.text: Identify potential locations for seed collection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential locations for seed collection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential locations for seed collection.

pcs.text: Obtain necessary approvals and permissions for access to site and removal of seeds
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain necessary approvals and permissions for access to site and removal of seeds?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain necessary approvals and permissions for access to site and removal of seeds.

pcs.text: Plan seed collecting operations to ensure safe working conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan seed collecting operations to ensure safe working conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan seed collecting operations to ensure safe working conditions.

pcs.text: Communicate with others involved in seed collection project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with others involved in seed collection project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with others involved in seed collection project.

pcs.text: Select and prepare materials, tools, equipment and personal protective equipment, check scales have been calibrated where appropriate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare materials, tools, equipment and personal protective equipment, check scales have been calibrated where appropriate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare materials, tools, equipment and personal protective equipment, check scales have been calibrated where appropriate.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to collect seed

elements.title: Select and assess seed

pcs.text: Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures when collecting and cleaning seed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures when collecting and cleaning seed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures when collecting and cleaning seed.

pcs.text: Follow environmental protection and biosecurity measures for the site

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow environmental protection and biosecurity measures for the site.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify plant species required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify plant species required.

pcs.text: Assess plant species and conditions to ensure seed quality standards are met

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess plant species and conditions to ensure seed quality standards are met.

pcs.text: Select method of seed collection according to conditions and best practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select method of seed collection according to conditions and best practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select method of seed collection according to conditions and best practice.

pcs.text: Collect seed with minimal damage to the parent plant
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect seed with minimal damage to the parent plant?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect seed with minimal damage to the parent plant.

pcs.text: Place seed in storage container and accurately label according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place seed in storage container and accurately label according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place seed in storage container and accurately label according to workplace requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Separate seed from inert and waste materials.

pcs.text: Weigh and store seed according to species and workplace requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weigh and store seed according to species and workplace requirements.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Accurately record seed information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Accurately record seed information.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report seed collection information and results.
